productName: SMC - Infused Joint Pack - Sativa - Orange Cookies - 5g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Orange Cookies supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of orange, citrus, and sweet, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
